name: GIFs & Boomerangs
description: 2-3 second animated videos of your photo session, perfect for social media sharing.

name: Guest Book / Scrapbook
description: 12x12 photo album with 20 top-loaded pages, photo inserts, adhesive, pens and markers.

name: Neon Sign
description: Choose from 'Better Together' (pink) or 'Always & Forever' (white). Custom signage also available.

name: Green Screen
description: Unlimited digital background options with logo, branding, and custom wording capability.

name: Custom Template Design
description: Our graphic designer creates a fully custom photo strip template matching your event theme.

name: Themed Props Bundle
description: Special props for your event theme: Wedding, Sweet 16, Quinceanera, Baby Shower, Casino, and more.

name: Flower Wall Backdrop
description: Stunning flower wall rental. Choose from BoHo, Glam Garden, Pink & White, Jungle, or Hedge styles.

name: Photo Booth Keychains
description: Sturdy keychains with printed photos in clear frames. Assembled on-site within minutes.
